title: guettarda krugii
intro: Guettarda krugii, also known as the 'Mountain Guettarda' or 'Pink Guettarda', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Guettarda krugii has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Guettarda krugii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Guettarda krugii is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
